no_testimonials_explanation: Client has not provided real, attributable customer testimonials. Per division rule (lp-build-rules.md §'Content authenticity'), no composite/illustrative quotes are shipped. Social proof on this LP comes from: (1) 45+ years family-owned trust stat band, (2) 13-brand OEM certification grid (#oem-brands), (3) lifetime warranty commitment. Recommend AM follow-up to collect 2-3 real attributed customer quotes for a future edit task.
form_fields_per_spec: situation — dropdown: accident / non-accident damage / insurance estimate / other-exploring
insurance — radio: active claim / insurance OOP / no OOP / not sure

form_lead_routing_doctrine.rule: ALL form submissions POST to the Keystone lead API via useMegaLeadForm — qualified AND disqualified.
form_lead_routing_doctrine.source: Task comment by lindsay@gomega.ai on 2026-05-14: 'make sure to send all leads even if they are disqualified to keystone! no need to qualify or disqualify anything on the landing page this will be done later'
form_lead_routing_doctrine.implementation: FormCard.tsx handleSubmit has NO early return based on qualifier answer. `qualified` flag (computed via qualifies()) is included in the payload for downstream ad-platform segmentation only. A separate `qualified_lead` dataLayer event fires when BOTH qualifying questions pass — used as the Google Ads conversion event per spec.
